2026-0654
2026-06-22GACOther Than Statutory AuthorityAgreement between the European Union and Canada laying down the conditions for the participation of Canadian legal entities and products originating in Canada to procurement under the SAFE InstrumentOrder authorizing the Minister of Foreign Affairs to take the actions necessary to bring into force for Canada the Agreement between the European Union and Canada laying down the conditions for the participation of Canadian legal entities and products originating in Canada to procurement under the SAFE Instrument done at Munich on 14 February, 2026.N/A
subject: Agreement between the European Union and Canada laying down the conditions for the participation of Canadian legal entities and products originating in Canada to procurement under the SAFE Instrument
precis: Order authorizing the Minister of Foreign Affairs to take the actions necessary to bring into force for Canada the Agreement between the European Union and Canada laying down the conditions for the participation of Canadian legal entities and products originating in Canada to procurement under the SAFE Instrument done at Munich on 14 February, 2026.
